Has production recommendation system experience at a startup (collaborative filtering with implicit, XGBoost) and Semantic Search/Milvus skills, but primary expertise is computer vision (YOLO, OpenCV) and the JD explicitly flags CV-only profiles as a weak fit for its IR/ranking focus.
